link_rule: Application links must be copied only from job.url. Never construct basf.jobs links.

jobs.title: Field Operations Assistant
jobs.description_preview: In the Philippines, BASF has been supporting manufacturers from various industries since 1963. Today, BASF is a leading supplier of chemicals for industries, including Construction and Coatings, Automotive, Nutrition Health, Home Personal Care, and Agriculture.
